zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Fray於1437年出生時，她的父親Sir John Fray46歲，母親Agnes Danvers32歲。她於1452年與Sir Humphrey Stafford在英國英格蘭賀福爾葛拉芙頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年5月12日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾享年45歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Fray于1437年出生时，她的父亲Sir John Fray46岁，母亲Agnes Danvers32岁。她于1452年与Sir Humphrey Stafford在英国英格兰賀福爾葛拉芙頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年5月12日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾享年45岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

nameMeanings.name: Fray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: rare variant of   Frey   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
English: from the personal name Fray, probably an Anglo-Norman French form of ancient Germanic Fredo (a pet form of names beginning with Fred- or Freth-), which was used by the Normans in Normandy.
English: nickname for a violent person, from Middle English fray, a shortened form of Middle English (Old French) affrai ‘attack, brawl, uproar’.

variants.name: Frey
meanings: Swiss German and German: status name for a free man, as opposed to a bondsman or serf, in the feudal system, from Middle High German vrī ‘free, independent’. This surname is also found in Hungary, Poland, and especially in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Free and Frei .
History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Fray was born in 1437, her father, Sir John Fray, was 46 and her mother, Agnes Danvers, was 32. She married Sir Humphrey Stafford in 1452, in Grafton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 May 1482, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Fray est née en 1437, son père, Sir John Fray, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Agnes Danvers, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Humphrey Stafford en 1452, à Grafton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1482, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Fray 1437 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Fray 46 und ihre Mutter Agnes Danvers 32. Sie hat 1452 in Grafton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Humphrey Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1482 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Fray è nata il nel 1437, sua padre, Sir John Fray, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Agnes Danvers, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Humphrey Stafford nel 1452, nel Grafton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1482, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Frayが1437年に生まれた時，父Sir John Frayは46歳，母Agnes Danversは32歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアグラフトンでSir Humphrey Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年5月12日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで45歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Fray(이)가 1437년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Fray(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Danvers(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 그라프턴에서 Sir Humphrey Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Fray nasceu em 1437, seu pai, Sir John Fray, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Danvers, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Humphrey Stafford em 1452, em Grafton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1482, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Fray родилась в 1437 г., её отцу по имени Sir John Fray было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Danvers, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Humphrey Stafford в 1452 г. в местности графтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 мая 1482 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Fray nació en 1437, su papá, Sir John Fray, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Agnes Danvers, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Humphrey Stafford en 1452, en Grafton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1482, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
